_note: Directly-measured device power figures used to derive the energy dimension per tier, with the measurement method for each. All whole-device unless noted.

laptop.method: WMI BatteryStatus.DischargeRate integrated over per-query windows; idle baseline subtracted
laptop.energy_basis: per-query trapezoidal integration of instantaneous discharge power (whole-device, gross); idle-subtracted also reported

phone.method: no-root dumpsys battery Charge counter (uAh) delta x pack voltage over a sustained-load window; idle window for baseline
phone.energy_basis: sustained-generation whole-device power (16.6 W) x measured inference latency; inference-attributable = 16.6-7.8 = 8.8 W
phone.note: measured on battery over adb-WiFi (USB unplugged); charge-counter resolution ~10-30 mAh so per-run mean is reliable, per-query is not

desktop.method: NVML nvmlDeviceGetPowerUsage (GPU-package), 10 Hz, trapezoidal-integrated per query by samplers/energy_integrate.py; idle baseline measured for 60 s before the run
desktop.energy_basis: per-query trapezoidal integration of GPU-package power (gross); idle-subtracted also reported per query
desktop.note: GPU-package power only (NVML), not whole-system; a wall meter or CPU RAPL would be needed for that. 200/200 queries had energy filled (none excluded).
